endpoints.label: Add Contact Campaign

fields.label: Campaign Name or ID
fields.description: The ID of the campaign to add the contact to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Contact Email
fields.description: The email of the contact to add to the campaign

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: customFieldsUi, firstName, lastContacted, lastName, lastOpen, lastReplied, mailsSent, phoneNumber)

endpoints.description: [unverified path] Add a contact to a campaign

fields.label: Campaign Name
fields.description: The name of the campaign to create

fields.label: Campaign Name or ID
fields.description: The ID of the campaign to duplicate. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: New Campaign Name
fields.description: The name of the new campaign to create

fields.label: Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: copyContacts, copyProvider, copyMails, copySettings)

fields.label: Campaign ID
fields.description: The ID of the campaign to retrieve

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Campaign ID
fields.description: The ID of the campaign to pause. The campaign must be in RUNNING mode.

fields.label: Campaign ID
fields.description: The ID of the campaign to start. Email provider and contacts must be set.

fields.label: Contact List Name or ID
fields.description: The ID of the contact list to add the contact to. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Contact Email
fields.description: The email of the contact to add to the contact list

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: customFieldsUi, firstName, lastContacted, lastName, lastOpen, lastReplied, mailsSent, phoneNumber)

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return
